arts.ttl: Fabian Schar turns air blue, Newcastle punch thrown & dressing room lock in
arts.sum: For all his failures as Newcastle boss, he managed to fire his team up to finally beat the Saints away from home in the Premier League in a 2-1 win, courtesy of a Stephen Carr thunderbolt at St Mary's. In 1997, his replacement Kenny Dalglish thought he'd cracked the South Coast hoodoo but watched on in horror as Clark, of all people in the fixture, fired the Magpies 2-0 up with eight minutes left before Neil Maddison and that man Le Tissier again struck to snatch a point.

arts.ttl: Newcastle linked with incredible midfield swap deal with European giants involving Sandro Tonali
arts.sum: Newcastle United find themselves at the center of a fascinating transfer rumour, with Juventus reportedly exploring a blockbuster swap deal involving Sandro Tonali and Douglas Luiz. According to Calciomercato, the Italian giants are keen to bring Tonali back to Serie A, offering Luiz as part of an exchange that could significantly reshape both clubs’ midfield […] The post Newcastle linked with incredible midfield swap deal with European giants involving Sandro Tonali appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle have perfect chance to get Champions League bandwagon back on track
arts.sum: Nevertheless another three points following victories at Ipswich, Manchester United and Spurs would see Newcastle win four consecutive away games in the Premier League for the first time since October 1996. As Newcastle United prepare to invade their territory endeavouring to regain that loving feeling, Southampton remain in grave danger of becoming record breakers.

arts.ttl: NEWCASTLE CONFIDENTIAL: World-renowned firm behind Real Madrid's super base to design new state-of-the-art training ground, Toon scouts track 'next Luka Modric' and why they face competition for targets from Man United
arts.sum: NEWCASTLE CONFIDENTIAL: The hope will be that after using a bottom-half training ground, Newcastle will have a complex that helps to attract and develop the world's best.

arts.ttl: Liverpool defender fighting for future after Newcastle United transfer interest
arts.sum: “Every game is a learning process for myself,” Quansah told the Daily Mirror this week. Quansah was being mooted as a potential makeweight in a deal that would have seen Anthony Gordon return to Merseyside but a transfer failed to materialise with the Anfield outfit being unwilling to let him go.

arts.ttl: Why Isak is Salah’s biggest threat for captaincy in Gameweek 23
arts.sum: Isak also faces a promoted opponent, with Newcastle United visiting a Southampton side who have conceded at least three goals in each of the last three Gameweeks. Salah has amassed 36 points in his three meetings with promoted clubs in 2024/25, including a goal, an assist and 14 points against Ipswich in Gameweek 1.
